choice: On first connect, list the discovered E*TRADE accounts and have the user map each one to an existing Account or create a new one; persist the external-account-id ↔ Account link so every later sync is fully automatic and unattended. Carry the account's tax bucket (d424a37f) from our Account, not from E*TRADE (its account 'type' is advisory only).
rationale: Silent auto-create on first sync risks duplicate or mis-typed Accounts (E*TRADE doesn't tell us our taxable/deferred/Roth bucket reliably), and tax bucket drives withdrawal order and RMDs (fe56f1d6) — too consequential to infer. A one-time explicit mapping, then a stored link, keeps the recurring path automatic while keeping the user in control of the tax-treatment assignment that the engine depends on.
